# X.Y.Z

Short intro line about the release theme. Bug-focused, feature-focused, polish, etc.

# https://github.com/gagga1/Berserk-AutoClicker/releases/tag/X.Y.Z

Changelog:

```ini
[stage-yyMMMdd]

[gagga1]
[+]; Added click curve editor with drag-handle control points
[+]; Added Gaussian / Uniform / Sine / Walk distribution shapes
[+]; Added floating HUD with live CPS and click count
[/]; Fixed window auto-resize lag when collapsing curve section
[/]; Fixed cadence input rendering vertically on first paint
[=]; Changed default hotkey from Ctrl+Y to F6
[=]; Renamed Advanced tab to Forge
[-]; Removed YouTube and Twitch links from Settings
```

## [Windows direct download](https://github.com/gagga1/Berserk-AutoClicker/releases/download/X.Y.Z/BerserkAutoClicker_X.Y.Z_x64-setup.exe)

---

## Tag legend

```
[+]; Added       new feature or content
[/]; Fixed       bug fix
[=]; Changed     existing behavior modified
[-]; Removed     feature or option dropped
[!]; Breaking    user has to redo something (resave preset, reset config, etc.)
[*]; Security    security-related change
```

## Stage codes

```
[early-yyMMMdd]    pre-public daily build
[beta-yyMMMdd]     public beta
[stable-yyMMMdd]   production release
[hotfix-yyMMMdd]   urgent patch
```

## Optional sections

If users need to take action manually (broken auto-update, settings reset, etc.):

```md
# ⚠️ You will have to redownload the app manually from here as there was an issue with automatic updates in the last version
```

If multiple contributors worked on the release, use one author block per person:

```ini
[gagga1]
[+]; Did this thing
[/]; Fixed that

[contributor2]
[+]; Added a different thing
```
